policy: Receipt logs must state the exact selected tool output used for claims.
Replay scripts require YOSYS_BIN and LIBERTY from the caller; no internal path defaults are public.
Ambient-tool scout runs are not customer-facing proof or PPA authority.

The one-command wrapper (replay_public_receipt.py) resolves the pinned suite, verifies tool identity (yosys version, OpenSTA version, Liberty sha256), and fails closed before any replay on a missing or mismatched tool.
